summary: Replaced invalid 'codex-mini-latest' defaults with 'gpt-5-mini' across config, workflows, tests, and documentation. Unit tests passed in CI (run id: 23261864739).

findings.title: Add a lint/test to detect obsolete default strings
findings.details: While all acceptance criteria are satisfied, a lightweight repo check (regex lint or test) would prevent accidental reintroduction of the obsolete 'codex-mini-latest' default in the future.
findings.recommendation: Add a CI lint step or a unit test that fails if 'codex-mini-latest' appears in tracked files.

findings.title: Missing repair-log.md in run artifacts
findings.details: The run directory .factory/runs/48/ does not contain a 'repair-log.md' artifact; if a repair log is expected as part of the run artifact contract, it should be added.
findings.recommendation: If a repair log is required by the artifact contract for this run, write and commit '.factory/runs/48/repair-log.md' before hand-off.
